svg.text: Autonomous E-Commerce Agent API — System Architecture
FastAPI · ReAct Loop · SQLAlchemy · PostgreSQL · Ollama LLM · Alembic · structlog
Duration tracking · Persists RequestLog to DB
get_agent_engine → assembles Repo → Service → LLM → Engine
1. REASON — Send messages + tool schemas to LLM
2. ACT — Execute tool via ToolRegistry (Pydantic validated, IDOR protected)
3. OBSERVE — Feed tool result back to LLM → repeat or respond
User · Order · Product · OrderItem · RequestLog · TimestampMixin
Async migrations · reads URL from Settings
SOLID · DRY · Clean Architecture · Dependency Injection · Repository Pattern · Unit of Work · Protocol-based DIP · IDOR Protection · Fail-safe Observability
